programme.title: The Best of Headstart with Karen Davila
The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: A secret CIA operative enhanced by a government project is targeted for assassination by his employers. Now he must go up against the very people who created him.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: Robert McCall finds himself at home in Southern Italy but he discovers his friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall knows what he has to do: become his friends' protector by taking on the mafia.

programme.title: Anaconda (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends facing mid-life crises head to the rainforest with the intention of remaking their favorite movie from their youth, only to find themselves in a fight for their lives against natural disasters, giant snakes and violent criminals.

programme.title: Puso Ng Pasko
programme.desc: Christopher cannot help but think that he is jinxed, but his luck changes when an impish Christmas elf appears, offering him and his siblings a wish.

programme.title: My Amnesia Girl
programme.desc: With his friends all settling down, a young man decides that it's time for him to pursue his true love. As fate would have it, he runs into an ex-girlfriend that he never got over. The catch: the girl has suffered a bout of amnesia, and has no recollection of their relationship.

programme.title: The Panti Sisters
programme.desc: A father announces to his three homosexual sons that he’s dying of cancer and offers up a $300 million inheritance if they give him grandchildren.

programme.title: Exes Baggage
programme.desc: After a chance encounter, Pia and Nix instantly hit it off. Natural conversations eventually develop into deep attraction. Despite their wounds from previous relationships, both decide to take a chance on each other. But when their love blossoms into a relationship, their differences will test their love and will make them question: Are they ready for love when they're still carrying baggage from their past?

programme.title: Mission Unstapabol: The Don Identity
programme.desc: After being released from prison for a crime he didnt commit, the smoothest and classiest master thief is back in town, Don Robert Fortun, the robber whos always in style! Now hes set on taking revenge on the man who framed him for murder, his brother Don Benjie.

programme.title: Minsa'y Isang Gamu-Gamo
programme.desc: Living near the US Clark Air Base, Corazon de la Cruz dreams of a better life in America… until the unspeakable happens.

programme.title: Bakit Lahat ng Gwapo May Boyfriend?
programme.desc: A woman who's had a string of boyfriends that turned out to be gay tests out the theories that she's developed on a childhood friend.

programme.title: Ikaw Pa Rin, Bongga Ka Boy
Manila's Finest
programme.desc: A film based on the life of retired Western Police District Colonel Jimmy Tiu, who last served as Sta. Mesa Police Station Commander.

programme.title: Mia
programme.desc: A nerdy forester, Jay Policarpio, who transforms mined-out land into rain forests pursues the self-destructive alcoholic, Mia Salazar, who recently joined the government's Doctor To The Barrios program to heal the tragedy of her fiance's death.
A famous vlogger commits suicide after her content is based online. When she is about to kill herself, a man is quick enough to save her.

programme.title: The Girl King
programme.desc: In the 17th Century, amidst a religious war in Europe, a young girl ascends to the throne of Lutheran Sweden, and defies all convention as she pursues her passions.

programme.title: Porno
programme.desc: An assassin, a porn dubber and a transgender. Three souls. One explicit illusion. To ﬁnd the ultimate joy in their empty lives. A safe haven, where passion and love mean humanity, ecstasy means enlightenment; and the soul is the ultimate arbiter of the truth.

programme.title: Angelito San Miguel At Ang Mga Batang City Jail
Imortal
programme.desc: Vilma Santos and Christopher De Leon portray two star crossed lovers, meeting each other across several lifetimes, hoping that in each cycle they can break down the walls that keep them apart.

programme.title: The Flor Contemplacion Story
programme.desc: The story of the Filipina domestic who was hanged in Singapore for allegedly killing her fellow maid is chronicled in a film which operates on various personal, social and political levels. Both controversial and critically acclaimed, it has brought Nora Aunor numerous citations for her intense portrayal as the fallen heroine of the story.
